_comment: kit settings template (v3.5). permissions.allow ships ACTIVE with read-only commands so review/research subagents don't spam permission prompts — trim or extend to taste. Hooks ship ENABLED (v3.5+): to disable, rename 'hooks' to something else (e.g. '_hooks_disabled') and restart the session. Keep SessionStart and Stop TOGETHER — the Stop gate reads the baseline that SessionStart records; without it, committed changes are invisible to the gate.
